metadata.title:
PROSPEROUS SEASON


IN SPOKANE REALTY

All Real Estate Men Unanimous in DECLARING 1908
Will See Decided Boom in thu Sale


of Property

pages.raw_text:
Spokane realty sales. while not ex-
actly booming. are steady. AS spring
approaches investments are frequent
and dealers say that better and
more prosperous season has not been
ushered in for several years.


1t is the consensus of opinion
among real estate men that the mar
ket opens with a steadier demand
than usual.


G. A. Harvey of Chamberlin &
Chamberlin said this morning that
he had not sold a speculative piece
of property in a week.


MY sales" said Mr.. Harvey, have
all been to persons who wish to make
this community their Iire's home.


There is no speculative incentive
as far as 1 can Judge. ] can say en-
phatically that no spring outlook has
been so prosperous as the one of
1903"


Chamberlin & Chamberlin also re-
